home.page-description: Real-time visibility into your Google Workspace security and compliance
home.page-warning: There are urgent security issues that require immediate attention.
user-groups.groups.page-description: Check settings and group memberships for internal and external accounts
user-groups.users.page-description: Track user activities, login status, 2FA and admin rights
users.warning.activeNoLogin: with a last login more than 1 year ago detected
users.warning.notActive: with a last login less than 1 week ago detected
score-detail.description: Detailed calculation factors are not available for this component
users.overview.activeLongNoLogin-title: Active users without long periods of inactivity
groups.highriskWarning: at high risk due to open or external institutions
groups.whoCanJoin.canRequest: Can request to become a member
groups.no-found: No groups found for this search
logout-dialog.description:
You are about to log out of CloudGuard. 
You can always log in again with your Google account.
logout-dialog.title: Would you like to log out
profile.header: View your profile information and account settings.
organisational-units.description: Monitor your organization's structure and policies
org-units.change-settings: Click here to adjust these settings
shared-drives.description: Check shared drive settings to ensure data security
shared-drives.share-with-outside-domain: sharing with users outside your domain
shared-drives.title: Shared Drives Control
devices.description: Check devices connected to Google Workspace for security compliance
devices.title: Devices Control
app-access.description: Control third-party apps that have access to your users' Google Workspace data
app-access.warning.full: This app has full access to one or more Google services. If this app is compromised, an attacker can read, modify and delete all data from {{count}} {{userWord}}.
app-access.critical_description: This app has critical access to
app-access.rights.external-request: Sending data to external servers (Risk of data leak)
app-access.rights.only-own-files: Only view files you created yourself
app-passwords.none: This user has no app passwords
app-passwords.title: Check user-configured app passwords for less secure apps
app-passwords.warning.description:
App passwords bypass two-step verification and should only be used for apps that don't support modern authentication. 
Consider switching to OAuth-based authentication whenever possible.
password-settings.admins-have-keys: All admins have registered security keys
password-settings.description: Overview of password policies, strength requirements and two-step verification per organizational unit
password-settings.no-2FA-data: No 2-Step Verification data available for this OU
password-settings.no-users-password-chan: No users with mandatory password change
password-settings.org-detailed-settings: Click on an organizational unit for detailed settings
password-settings.users-password-text: user(s) must change their password at the next login
password-settings.warning:
2-Step Verification is not mandatory for all organizational units. 
Make 2SV mandatory for better security.
password-settings.warning.never-expires: Passwords never expire for some organizational units.
password-settings.warning.strong-not-req: Strong passwords are not required for some organizational units.
password-settings.warning.weak-length: The minimum password length is less than 12 characters for some organizational units.
password-settings.warning.without-keys:
There are administrators without Security Keys. 
Secure admin accounts with hardware security keys.
domain.all-linked: All domains linked to your Workspace
domain.dns-records.important: Important DNS records for email authentication and security
domain.dns-records.none: No DNS records found for this domain
domain.dns-records.select-domain: Select a domain to view DNS records
domain.none-selected: Select a domain to view security controls
domain.security-checks.advices: Please refer to the help articles to resolve this.
domain.security-checks.critical-problems:
Critical issues have been found with this domain. 
Mail flow can be affected.
domain.security-checks.none: No security controls found for this domain
domain.security-checks.problems: There are warnings for this domain.
domain.dns-records.description.caa: CAA record limits which certificate authorities can issue SSL/TLS certificates
domain.dns-records.description.dkim: DKIM record for digital signing of outgoing emails
domain.dns-records.description.dmarc: DMARC record for policies surrounding email authentication and protection against spoofing
domain.dns-records.description.dnssec: DNSKEY records for DNSSEC – cryptographic verification of DNS responses
domain.dns-records.description.mx: MX record for routing incoming emails to Google servers
domain.dns-records.description.spf: SPF record authorizes Google to send emails on behalf of your domain
domain.dns-records.description.txt: TXT record for Google site verification (optional)
domain.control.description.action-requir: Domain has no mail server or MX records are missing
SPF record is missing or not configured correctly
domain.control.description.attention.dki: DKIM record is not configured correctly
domain.control.description.attention.dma: DMARC policy can be tightened to reject
domain.control.description.attention.mx: No Google mail exchangers found – check relay host configuration
domain.control.description.attention.spf: SPF record does not contain include:_spf.google.com
domain.control.description.valid.dkim: DKIM is active for outgoing mail
domain.control.description.valid.mx: MX records correctly point to Google
domain.control.tip.caa: Add CAA records to determine which certificate authorities can issue certificates for your domain
domain.control.tip.cname: Configure CNAME for mail subdomain if desired
domain.control.tip.dkim: Configure DKIM in Google Admin for your domain
domain.control.tip.dmarc: Consider increasing policy to 'reject' for maximum security
domain.control.tip.dnssec: Enable DNSSEC with your domain registrar for extra security
domain.control.tip.mx: Change MX records to Google mail servers (e.g. ASPMX.L.GOOGLE.COM)
domain.control.tip.spf: If no other servers send mail for this domain, set: v=spf1 include:_spf.google.com ~all
domain.control.tip.txt: Add google-site-verification TXT record for verification
home.risky-accounts.singular: There is {{count}} account with potential security risks that requires attention. This account is inactive or suspended but still has licenses assigned.
home.risky-accounts.plural: There are {{count}} accounts with potential security risks that require attention. These accounts are inactive or suspended but still have licenses assigned.
licenses.description: Monitor your Google Workspace license usage
licenses.inactive-users.description: These users have not logged in for more than 90 days
licenses.inactive-users.none: No inactive users with licenses found
feedback.description: Real-time notifications about security issues and the possibility of feedback
feedback.severity.all: There are no critical notifications or warnings for this Workspace.
feedback.severity.none:
No notifications with this filter. 
Try a different filter.
feedback.warning: These issues require immediate attention to prevent security risks.
feedback.automatic:
This feedback is automatically processed in our ticketing system. 
You will receive a confirmation by email.
feedback.describe-feedback: Describe your feedback, concerns, or questions about this security issue...
login.cloudguard-explanation: CloudGuard is a security dashboard for Google Workspace that helps you monitor and improve your organization's security.
login.description: Log in with your Google Workspace account to access your security dashboard
forbidden.no-access:
You do not have admin rights to access this dashboard. 
Contact your administrator for access.
forbidden.note.description: Only authorized admin accounts have access to CloudGuard
access-denied.description:
Your organization does not currently have active access to CloudGuard. 
Please contact your CLOUDMEN account manager to activate this.
access-denied.note.description: Access to this security dashboard requires an active CloudGuard license in our system.
server-error.description:
We are currently unable to connect to the CloudGuard servers. 
The system may be under maintenance or temporarily offline.
server-error.state.description:
Our technicians are aware. 
Please try again in a few minutes.
server-error.title: System unreachable
preferences.app-access.highRisk: Applications with a high risk profile
preferences.description: Configure which controls generate notifications and contribute to the security score.
preferences.devices.osVersion: Unsupported or outdated operating system version
preferences.info.description:
Choose which security checks generate notifications and influence your security score. 
Disabled checks remain visible but are shown without warnings and do not affect your score.
preferences.info.label: Explanation of security preferences
preferences.info.title: About these settings

preferences.shared-drives.outside-domain: Sharing with users outside the organizational domain allowed
preferences.title: Security preferences
preferences.users-groups.account-activit: Account inactivity and signaling around login behavior
preferences.users-groups.external-member: Groups with external members or increased risk (open access or external management)
